message:
feat(showcase): mega-showcase search/filter, visual-fx perf, and snapshot baselines

mermaid_mega_showcase.rs (+376 lines):
  Add fuzzy search and category-based filtering to the mega showcase
  screen. New features include:
  - mega_sample_category(): auto-classify samples by diagram type
    (flow, sequence, class, state, er, gantt, mindmap, pie, generated)
  - mega_sample_matches_tokens(): multi-token search across name,
    category, and raw source text (case-insensitive)
  - search_matches/search_match_idx state fields for cursor navigation
    through filtered results
  - rebuild_search_matches() to recompute matches on query change
  - filter_active() predicate for conditional rendering

mermaid_showcase.rs (+10 lines):
  Add stabilize_metrics_for_snapshot() helper that zeros out timing-
  dependent parse_ms/layout_ms/render_ms metrics before view(), making
  snapshot tests deterministic and eliminating flaky timing diffs.

visual_effects.rs:
  Performance optimizations for the Mandelbrot renderer:
  - Hoist ln(2), max_iter, time_hue_offset, half_w, half_h out of
    the pixel double-loop (were recomputed per-pixel before)
  - Cache x^2 and y^2 across the iteration loop condition and body,
    saving 2 multiplications per Mandelbrot iteration
  - Hoist y0 computation out of the inner (px) loop since it is
    constant per row
  - Remove unused pick_quake_wall() test helper

screen_snapshots.rs:
  Wire stabilize_metrics_for_snapshot() call into the mermaid snapshot
  test harness so all mermaid showcase snapshots are timing-invariant.

Snapshot baselines (22 .snap files):
  Update all mega_showcase and mermaid_showcase golden snapshots to
  reflect the new search UI state, help overlay changes, and stabilized
  timing metrics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
